page.title: Category:6th-century people by nationality and occupation

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の人物 (国と職業別)}} 6世紀の人物を国と職業別に分類したカテゴリを集めたカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:6th-century people by nationality and occupation}} [[Category:6世紀の人物|*こくせき]] [[Category:6世紀の人物 (職業別)|*]] [[Category:6世紀各国の人物|*]] [[Category:各世紀の人物 (国と職業別)|06]]」
revision.text:
{{各世紀の人物 (国と職業別)}} 6世紀の人物を国と職業別に分類したカテゴリを集めたカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:6th-century people by nationality and occupation}}
[[Category:6世紀の人物|*こくせき]] [[Category:6世紀の人物 (職業別)|*]] [[Category:6世紀各国の人物|*]] [[Category:各世紀の人物 (国と職業別)|06]]

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:6世紀の人物 (国と職業別)]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص في القرن 6 حسب الجنسية والمهنة]] [[bn:Category:জাতীয়তা ও পেশা অনুযায়ী ৬ষ্ঠ শতাব্দীর ব্যক্তি]] [[vi:Category:Người thế kỷ 6 theo quốc tịch và nghề nghiệp]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:6世紀日本の人物_(職業別)]].

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の人物 (国と職業別)}} 6世紀の人物を国と職業別に分類したカテゴリを集めたカテゴリ。 {{catlink|6世紀各国の人物 (職業別)}} {{see also|en:Category:6th-century people by nationality and occupation}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:6世紀の人物 (国と職業別)]]|version=87224257}} [[ja:Category:6世紀の人物 (国と職業別)]]
==Old Content== [[en:6th-century people by nationality and occupation]][[en:6th-century people by nationality and occupation]]
[[ja:Category:6世紀の人物 (国と職業別)]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص في القرن 6 حسب الجنسية والمهنة]] [[bn:Category:জাতীয়তা ও পেশা অনুযায়ী ৬ষ্ঠ শতাব্দীর ব্যক্তি]] [[vi:Category:Người thế kỷ 6 theo quốc tịch và nghề nghiệp]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:6世紀日本の人物_(職業別)]]. {{translated page|ja|Category:6世紀の人物 (国と職業別)|version=87224257|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.text:

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
